comment.body:
Trading signals are not part of the service!
Because I’m unable to connect the Substack chat with my algorithm to provide real-time signals, I’ll only give trading signals if I’m trading manually—and only for educational purposes, not as financial advice.

For intraday trading, I use low leverage, a three-part scale-in strategy, and tight stop losses. I rarely hold positions for more than ten minutes. I also have a daily profit target: once I reach it, I don’t trade any further that day.

Please read the educational posts for more details and to better understand the underlying logic.
comment.raw_body:

For intraday trading, I use low leverage, a three-part scale-in strategy, and tight stop losses. I rarely hold positions for more than ten minutes. I also have a daily profit target: once I reach it, I don’t trade any further that day.

Please read the educational posts for more details and to better understand the underlying logic.
